summary: Fixed all 6 F841 unused-variable warnings in suite-api/ across 3 files. Removed 5 dead variable assignments and prefixed 1 intentional placeholder with underscore. Zero regressions in E2E tests.
issues: test_chunked_upload_workflow is a pre-existing failure (assert 400 == 200) not caused by these changes — not documented in swarm-113 notes, may be a new pre-existing failure to add to known issues list
